Complete pet food for cats Suitable for fussy cats With Fresh Meat With Yucca Schidigera LE CHAT WITH CHICKEN AND TURKEY is a complete pet food designed for adult cats with sophisticated appetite that need a balanced nutrition. It's produced with quality chicken and turkey, source of proteins with elevated biological value. Through the content of Taurine and Vitamin A it contributes to maintain the well-being of the sight. MOS (Mannano-oligosaccharides) and FOS (Fructo-oligosaccharides) prebiotics support the intestinal bacterial ora, while the Yucca Schidigera aids the reduction of faecal odours. Omega-3 and Omega-6 essential fatty acids contribute to the maintenance of a soft and shiny coat. Furthermore, it contains fresh meat for an optimal palatability. Complete pet food for cats With vegetables Source of natural fibresA complete feed, developed for adult cats that need a controlled diet. Made with the highest-quality beef, rich in high biological value proteins. Helps maintain healthy vision thanks to the Taurine and Vitamin A content. The MOS (mannan oligosaccharides) and FOS (fructooligosaccharides) act as regulators for intestinal bacterial microflora, while the presence of Yucca Schidigera reduces faecal odour. The Omega-3 and Omega-6 essential fatty acids help to keep the fur soft and shiny. Also contains vegetables that provide a source of natural fibres. Complete pet food for kittens A complete feed, developed for kittens (1-12 months) that need a controlled diet, for a balanced growth. Made with the highest-quality chicken, rich in high biological value proteins. Helps maintain healthy vision thanks to the Taurine and Vitamin A content. The MOS (mannan oligosaccharides) and FOS (fructooligosaccharides) act as regulators for intestinal bacterial microflora, while the presence of Yucca Schidigera reduces faecal odour. The Omega-3 and Omega-6 essential fatty acids help to keep the fur soft and shiny. It also contains rice, cooked through an extrusion process, that provides a highly digestible supply of carbohydrates. The first ingredient is chicken and the formulation is characterised by its digestibility and palatability due to the inclusion of fresh meat. The formulation is enriched with XOS (Xylo-oligosaccharide), next generation prebiotics to support intestinal wellness. The inclusion of select ingredients, such as rose hip with antioxidant compounds to neutralize free radicals and yucca schidigera to limit intestinal odours, is the result of Made in Italy re-search to support the quality of our cat' s life. Formulated with salmon oil, source of omega-3 fatty acids for wellness and a shiny coat and with pea fibre for the physiological expulsion of hairballs. No added dyes and artificial preservatives.
